task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree or Field Editor, the 'pan_motor' node should be selected, showing its 'minPosition' field set to -1.57 and 'maxPosition' field set to 1.57.
In the Webots Scene Tree or Field Editor, the 'tilt_motor' node should be selected, showing its 'minPosition' field set to -0.78 and 'maxPosition' field set to 0.78.

task_completion.description: Add and configure a Zoom node to the ptz_camera
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Zoom' node should be visible under the 'ptz_camera' node in the Scene Tree. In the Field Editor, its 'maxFieldOfView' must be set to 0.87 and 'minFieldOfView' must be set to 0.087.

task_completion.description: Add and configure a Focus node to the ptz_camera
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Focus' node should be visible under the 'ptz_camera' node in the Scene Tree. In the Field Editor, its 'minFocalDistance' must be set to 0.5 and 'maxFocalDistance' must be set to 50.0.

task_completion.description: Save the modified world to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots window title bar should display 'ptz_crawler_configured.wbt', or a file explorer/terminal window should show the file 'ptz_crawler_configured.wbt' successfully saved in '/home/ga/Desktop/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Webots GUI to configure the robot
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Webots Scene Tree and Field Editor to make changes, rather than simply editing the .wbt text file in a code editor.
The modifications to the motors, camera, zoom, and focus should clearly be nested under the 'INSPECTION_CRAWLER' robot node in the Scene Tree.
Screenshots should show the agent navigating menus, adding nodes, and typing in values step-by-step, rather than running a script that instantly applies all configurations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target robot is INSPECTION_CRAWLER. The pan_motor limits must be exactly minPosition: -1.57, maxPosition: 1.57. The tilt_motor limits must be exactly minPosition: -0.78, maxPosition: 0.78. The Zoom node must have maxFieldOfView: 0.87, minFieldOfView: 0.087. The Focus node must have minFocalDistance: 0.5, maxFocalDistance: 50.0. The final file must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/ptz_crawler_configured.wbt.
